title: Gods Of Olympus
description: Adds a plethora of Greek God themed items
body:
God's of Olympus is a Greek-God inspired mod which allows players to harness the powers of the gods. Soar through the sky using Hermes' Winged Sandals, or be completely invisible to all through Hades' Helm of Darkness. With this mod, all of that is possible. In order to craft any of these item however, you must first gain the blessing of the god. Battle the Wither for the blessing of Hades, seek out a wandering villager for the blessing or Hermes, or defeat the elder guardian of the sea for the blessing of Poseidon. With these blessings, numerous armors or items can be crafted with their own unique abilities.



THIS MOD IS NOT FULLY FINISHED. While no issues are expected to show up in gameplay, not every item has been implemented fully.



Find Poseidon's blessing by killing an Elder Guardian.
Find Hades' blessing by killing the Wither.
Find Hermes' blessing through a Wandering Villager.
Find Apollo's blessing by killing an Evoker.
Find The Blessing of Olympus by trading with a Cleric.
